# W003 should not fire for field access inside {{with}} on a pointer field.
# {{with .Owner}} guards against nil — the body only executes when Owner
# is non-nil, so accessing fields on the dereferenced value is safe.

check-templates -w
! stderr 'W003'

-- go.mod --
module example.com/app

go 1.25.0
-- main.go --
package main

import (
	"embed"
	"fmt"
	"html/template"
	"net/http"
)

//go:embed *.gohtml
var source embed.FS

var templates = template.Must(template.ParseFS(source, "*"))

type Owner struct {
	ID   int
	Name string
}

type Page struct {
	Title string
	Owner *Owner
}

func handleOwner(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	_ = templates.ExecuteTemplate(w, "detail.gohtml", Page{
		Title: "Owner",
		Owner: &Owner{ID: 1, Name: "Alice"},
	})
}

var _ = fmt.Sprint

-- detail.gohtml --
<h1>{{.Title}}</h1>
{{with .Owner}}
<p>{{.Name}} (ID: {{.ID}})</p>
{{end}}
